title: LT1 Step Test Report
description: Schema for LT1 aerobic threshold test report exported from Garmin watch app or parsed from FIT file.

schema_version.description: Report schema version for backward-compatible parsing.

test_protocol_version.description: Watch app protocol version (FIT session field 14).

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when report was generated.

athlete.description: Athlete metadata from Garmin user profile.

hr_max.description: Max HR in bpm if known.

is_chest_strap.description: True if ANT+ external HRM was detected providing real per-beat RR intervals.

confidence.description: Source classification confidence. Optical capped at 0.3.

warnings.description: E.g. 'Optical HR detected — DFA alpha1 reliability reduced'.

lt1_hr_bpm.description: Estimated LT1 heart rate in beats per minute. 0 if not detected.

lt1_pace_sm.description: Estimated LT1 pace in seconds per meter. 0 if pace unavailable.

lt1_pace_min_km.description: LT1 pace formatted as min:sec per km (derived from lt1_pace_sm). E.g. '5:23'.

lt1_power_w.description: Estimated LT1 running power in watts. 0 if power sensor unavailable.

dfa_a1_at_detection.description: DFA alpha1 value at the estimated LT1 crossing point (always ~0.75).

detection_stage.description: Stage number (1–6) where the LT1 crossing was bracketed. -1 if not detected.

confidence_score.description: Composite confidence [0,1]. Accounts for signal quality, slope, monotonicity, source.

signal_quality_overall.description: Mean RR quality score across the entire test.

warnings.description: Non-fatal issues found during detection (non-monotone alpha1, low quality, etc.).

stages.description: Per-stage summary data. Length = number of completed stages (max 6).

mean_dfa_a1.description: Mean DFA alpha1 over valid windows.

validity_score.description: Fraction of 30-s windows that were valid.

window_count.description: Total 30-s DFA windows in this stage.

timeseries.description: Time-series arrays for plotting. Sampled every 30 s (DFA update interval). Sourced from FIT records with developer field data.

timestamps_s.description: Seconds since test start for each sample.

dfa_a1.description: DFA alpha1 at each sample. -1.0 = not computed.

power_w.description: Running power in watts. 0 = no power sensor.

rr_quality.description: RR quality score [0,1] at each sample.

valid_window.description: Whether this sample was in the valid analysis window.
